title: AutumnPack Addon: Leaf Moss
description: Changes Moss Blocks to fit the Autumn aesthetic
body:
# InnerToast's AutumnPack Required!

Autumnpack is a vanilla-like change to make your minecraft world seem all cozy and orange. If you do not already own it, please download here: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack

![A screenshot of a Leaf Pile on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DD8X3N7q/images/23ab9526f19bf4750971537b1dae2d02887373f6.png)

## Official Autumnpack Addon: Leaf Piles

This addon for [Autumnpack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack)
 makes moss blocks and carpets into leaf piles. 

The main issue for why this was made into an addon to Autumnpack is because Lush Caves look ugly. Alongside the fact that there should be at least some green foliage in your MC world.

---
